title: eschweileria sandwicensis
intro: Eschweileria sandwicensis, also known as Hawaiian sandalwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eschweileria sandwicensis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy applications.
